reconNotes: securitySignals are passive heuristics (path, query names, status mix, Content-Type, channel). Not a verdict; validate manually. For Postman or Swagger, use the OpenAPI or Postman export buttons.

securityHeaders.access-control-allow-headers: Origin, X-Requested-With, Content-Type, Accept, requestcheckkey, appid, token, X-Authorization-Tool
Origin, X-Requested-With, Content-Type, Accept, requestcheckkey, appid, token, X-Authorization-Tool
